title: Shepherd the Flock

segments.text: Shepherd
the flock with
tender,
loving
care.
Shepherd by
life and
one an
other
bear.
Like Christ,
who sought us, brought us to His
keep,
Cherish
the
flock He
loves and
feed
His
sheep!
Tend to His sheep and care for all their needs!
Bring God’s supply, which out of love proceeds!
Reach those whose burdens seem too much to bear!
Nurture their heart and soul through loving care!
Our Father’s care meets every inward need,
Binds all our wounds till we are buoyant, freed.
His tender love heals broken, wounded hearts,
Restores communion and His life imparts.
Day after day, by taking in the Word,
We’re nourished and, believing, reassured,
Shepherded by the Lord subjectively,
Proof God is caring for us tenderly.
Have we not found green pastures, there to lay,
Waters of rest, with paths to mark our way?
Led through the valley, guided inwardly,
Come to the Father’s presence joyfully!
Mountains majestic, streams with cataracts!
Christ as our joy protects us from attacks!
Rescued, uplifted with sustaining pow’r,
We shelter in His presence hour by hour!
God’s heart toward us is good in every way.
Are we His match in all we do and say,
Stewards, whose hearts the love of Christ constrains,
Who minister the food that builds the saints?
Shepherding needs the maintenance of life,
The cross annulling selfishness and strife,
Prayers full of light that set our hearts ablaze,
Till every word we speak God’s love conveys!
Treasure the saints! Each one is such a gift!
Obey our King to mend each inward rift!
Honor the Body, holding to the Head,
His covenant of peace the way we’re led!
Our words and actions are the gateway in;
Live Christ by speaking, building to begin!
Shoulder the lost and rescue the forlorn!
Stitch upon stitch, our wedding gown adorn.
What righteousness does shepherding display!
The flock is cared for, cherished in this way!
The Father loves us as He loves the Son,
His love the bond that joins us all as one!
